description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, multi-gabled roof clad in reddish-brown shingles, with a prominent central dormer and a large stone chimney. The exterior walls are a mix of timber framing and stonework, giving it a medieval, storybook appearance. Windows are set in wooden frames, with some featuring diamond-patterned panes and decorative wooden mullions. The structure includes an overhanging upper story supported by wooden brackets, and a small covered entryway with a sloped roof. Architectural details such as exposed beams, intricate woodwork, and a mix of stone and wood textures add to its historic charm. The overall design suggests a compact, vertical layout with two main stories and an attic space.
description: A tall, medieval-style house with a steep gabled roof, timber framing, stone chimney, and decorative windows. The structure combines stone and wood, with intricate details and an overhanging upper story.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, central dormer, overhanging upper story, and large stone chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the steep roof, stone chimney, and a small gabled window, with less visible entry details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back gable, stone base, and symmetrical roof, with the chimney offset to one side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals two gabled dormer windows and the timber-framed upper story, with minimal entry features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with decorative dormers and mullioned windows
attribute_entryway_design: Small covered entry with a sloped roof, wooden door, and stone steps, accented by timber framing and overhang
